B.Sc. Zoology.exp: Scientific study of animals covering structure, physiology, behaviour, evolution, genetics and ecology.
B.Sc. Zoology.imp: This course forms the foundation of animal sciences. It prepares students for higher studies and careers in wildlife biology, ecology, conservation, veterinary research, zoological studies and teaching.

B.Sc. Biotechnology.exp: Integration of biology with modern technology including genetics, molecular biology and bioinformatics.
B.Sc. Biotechnology.imp: This course is central to modern science and industry. It enables careers in biotechnology firms, pharmaceuticals, diagnostics, agriculture and advanced molecular research.

B.Sc. Life Sciences.exp: Interdisciplinary study of biology at molecular, cellular, organismal and ecological levels.
B.Sc. Life Sciences.imp: It provides academic flexibility and a broad base, allowing students to specialize later in diverse biological fields such as ecology, genetics or biotechnology.

B.Sc. Animal Science.exp: Study of animal nutrition, breeding, physiology, and management.
B.Sc. Animal Science.imp: Prepares for careers in livestock management, animal research, and agriculture.

B.Sc. Genetics.exp: Study of genes, heredity, genetic variation, and molecular genetics.
B.Sc. Genetics.imp: Foundation for careers in genetic counseling, research, biotechnology, and medicine.

B.Sc. Bioinformatics.exp: Integration of biology, computer science, and information technology.
B.Sc. Bioinformatics.imp: Crucial for genomic research, drug discovery, and biological data analysis.

B.Sc. Environmental Science.exp: Study of environmental systems, conservation, pollution control, and sustainable development.
B.Sc. Environmental Science.imp: Essential for careers in environmental consulting, conservation, policy-making, and sustainability management.

B.Sc. Physiology.exp: Study of biological functions and processes in living organisms.
B.Sc. Physiology.imp: Important for understanding how organisms function at cellular and systemic levels.

B.Sc. Botany.exp: Study of plant biology, classification, and ecology.
B.Sc. Botany.imp: Foundation for plant sciences and botanical research.

B.Sc. Medical Lab Tech.exp: Training in laboratory techniques for medical diagnosis and research.
B.Sc. Medical Lab Tech.imp: Prepares for careers in diagnostic laboratories and healthcare facilities.

B.Sc. Marine Biology.exp: Study of marine organisms, ocean ecosystems, and marine conservation.
B.Sc. Marine Biology.imp: Foundation for careers in marine research, conservation, fisheries, and oceanography.

B.Sc. Fisheries Science.exp: Study of fish biology, aquaculture, fisheries management, and aquatic ecosystems.
B.Sc. Fisheries Science.imp: Crucial for careers in fisheries departments, aquaculture industries, and marine resource management.

B.Sc. Veterinary Science.exp: Study of animal health, diseases, surgery, and animal husbandry.
B.Sc. Veterinary Science.imp: Essential for becoming a veterinarian and for careers in animal healthcare, research, and public health.

B.V.Sc & AH.exp: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - professional degree for veterinarians.
B.V.Sc & AH.imp: Mandatory for practicing veterinary medicine and surgery in India.

B.Sc. Oceanography.exp: Study of oceans, their physical, chemical, and biological properties.
B.Sc. Oceanography.imp: Essential for marine research, conservation, and ocean resource management.

B.Sc. Aquaculture.exp: Study of aquatic organism farming, breeding, and management.
B.Sc. Aquaculture.imp: Important for sustainable seafood production and aquatic resource management.

B.Sc. Geography.exp: Study of Earth's landscapes, environments, and human-environment interactions.
B.Sc. Geography.imp: Important for environmental planning, conservation, and resource management.

B.Sc. Public Health.exp: Study of population health, disease prevention, and health policy.
B.Sc. Public Health.imp: Foundation for careers in health administration, epidemiology, and health education.

B.Sc. Microbiology.exp: Study of microorganisms including bacteria, viruses, fungi, and their applications.
B.Sc. Microbiology.imp: Important for healthcare, pharmaceutical, food, and environmental industries.

B.Sc. Forensic Science.exp: Application of scientific methods to criminal and civil laws.
B.Sc. Forensic Science.imp: Essential for careers in crime labs, investigative agencies, and law enforcement.

B.Sc. Wildlife Science.exp: Study of wildlife ecology, behavior, and conservation.
B.Sc. Wildlife Science.imp: Foundation for careers in wildlife research, forestry, and conservation.

B.Sc. Forestry.exp: Study of forest ecosystems, management, and conservation.
B.Sc. Forestry.imp: Essential for careers in forest services and environmental management.

B.Sc. Psychology.exp: Study of mind and behavior, including animal psychology.
B.Sc. Psychology.imp: Important for understanding animal behavior, training, and conservation psychology.

B.Sc. Education.exp: Preparation for teaching and instructional design.
B.Sc. Education.imp: Crucial for teaching biology and science communication.

M.Sc. Zoology.exp: Advanced animal biology covering physiology, ecology, evolution, and genetics.
M.Sc. Zoology.imp: Strong foundation for research, teaching, and specialized biological careers.

M.Sc. Wildlife Biology.exp: Advanced study of wildlife species, behavior, and conservation.
M.Sc. Wildlife Biology.imp: Essential for wildlife research, conservation projects, and doctoral studies.

M.Sc. Microbiology.exp: Advanced study of microorganisms and their roles in various systems.
M.Sc. Microbiology.imp: Important for specialized research in health, environment, and industry.

M.Sc. Biotechnology.exp: Advanced biotech applications in medicine, agriculture, and environment.
M.Sc. Biotechnology.imp: Prepares for high-level roles in biotech R&D and industry leadership.

M.Sc. Marine Biology.exp: Advanced study of marine organisms, ecosystems, and ocean conservation.
M.Sc. Marine Biology.imp: Vital for marine research institutions, conservation, and fisheries management.

M.Sc. Oceanography.exp: Study of physical, chemical, and biological ocean processes.
M.Sc. Oceanography.imp: Important for climate research, marine policy, and ocean resource management.

M.Sc. Fisheries Science.exp: Advanced fish biology, aquatic resource management, and fisheries technology.
M.Sc. Fisheries Science.imp: Crucial for sustainable fisheries management and aquaculture development.

M.Sc. Aquaculture.exp: Advanced aquatic farming techniques, breeding, and management systems.
M.Sc. Aquaculture.imp: Supports sustainable seafood production and aquatic resource development.

M.Sc. Public Health.exp: Advanced study of health policy, management, and health promotion.
M.Sc. Public Health.imp: Crucial for leadership roles in public health organizations and government.

M.Sc. Epidemiology.exp: Advanced study of disease distribution and determinants in populations.
M.Sc. Epidemiology.imp: Essential for disease surveillance, outbreak investigation, and health research.

M.Sc. Forensic Science.exp: Advanced forensic techniques and investigative methodologies.
M.Sc. Forensic Science.imp: Prepares for specialized roles in forensic labs and criminal investigation.

M.Sc. Paleontology.exp: Advanced study of fossils, ancient life forms, and Earth history.
M.Sc. Paleontology.imp: Essential for paleontological research, museum curation, and academic careers.

M.Sc. Neuroscience.exp: Advanced study of the nervous system, brain function, and behavior.
M.Sc. Neuroscience.imp: Vital for brain research, medical science, and behavioral neurology.

M.Sc. Animal Behaviour.exp: Specialized study of animal actions, communication, and social systems.
M.Sc. Animal Behaviour.imp: Supports careers in ethology, wildlife conservation, and zoo management.

M.Sc. Entomology.exp: Advanced study of insects, their biology, and ecological roles.
M.Sc. Entomology.imp: Important for agricultural pest management, health research, and biodiversity studies.

M.Sc. Toxicology.exp: Advanced study of poisons, toxins, and their effects on organisms.
M.Sc. Toxicology.imp: Key for pharmacological safety, environmental health, and forensic science.

M.Sc. Environmental Science.exp: Advanced study of environmental systems and sustainability.
M.Sc. Environmental Science.imp: Essential for environmental leadership and specialized ecological research.

M.Sc. Conservation Biology.exp: Advanced study of biodiversity protection and ecosystem management.
M.Sc. Conservation Biology.imp: Crucial for conservation project leadership and policy development.

M.Sc. Forestry.exp: Advanced forest management, silviculture, and forest ecology.
M.Sc. Forestry.imp: Prepares for leadership roles in forest services and nature conservation.

M.Sc. Specialization.exp: Focused study in a specific niche of life sciences or related fields.
M.Sc. Specialization.imp: Allows for deep expertise in a particular research or industrial area.

Ph.D. Zoology.exp: Doctoral research in animal biology, ecology, physiology, or evolution.
Ph.D. Zoology.imp: Academic leadership and advanced research positions in animal sciences.

Ph.D. Wildlife Biology.exp: Doctoral research on wildlife species, behavior, and conservation.
Ph.D. Wildlife Biology.imp: Leadership roles in wildlife research, conservation, and policy-making.

Ph.D. Marine Biology.exp: Advanced marine organism research and ocean ecosystem studies.
Ph.D. Marine Biology.imp: Ocean conservation leadership and marine research direction.

Ph.D. Microbiology.exp: Advanced doctoral research on microorganisms and their applications.
Ph.D. Microbiology.imp: Research leadership in health, agriculture, and industrial biotech.

Ph.D. Biotechnology.exp: Doctoral research in advanced biotechnology and bioengineering.
Ph.D. Biotechnology.imp: Innovation leadership and strategic research in the biotech industry.

Ph.D. Environmental Science.exp: Advanced ecosystem research and environmental policy studies.
Ph.D. Environmental Science.imp: Leadership in sustainability science and environmental management.

Ph.D. Neuroscience.exp: Doctoral research on brain function, neural networks, and behavior.
Ph.D. Neuroscience.imp: Leadership in brain research and neuroscientific clinical applications.

Ph.D. Paleontology.exp: Doctoral research on fossils, evolution, and prehistoric ecosystems.
Ph.D. Paleontology.imp: Museum leadership, academic professorship, and advanced Earth research.

Ph.D. Public Health.exp: Doctoral research on health policy, epidemiology, and health systems.
Ph.D. Public Health.imp: Strategic leadership in public health institutions and global health policy.

Ph.D. Entomology.exp: Doctoral research on insects and their roles in ecosystems.
Ph.D. Entomology.imp: Leadership in agricultural research and biodiversity conservation.

Ph.D. in specialization.exp: Highest academic degree focusing on original research in a specific field.
Ph.D. in specialization.imp: Necessary for academic careers, lead scientist roles, and industrial leadership.
